text:
EMMA
 PALMER
 
 emma.palmer@btinternet.com | +44 7702 775656 | linkedin.com/in/em-palmer | Bridgwater, UK 
 
Senior Marketing Operations Manager 
A dedicated IC with over 20 years of building the technical 'engine rooms' for global B2B SaaS leaders. 
Specialised in SFDC architecture and Salesforce flow orchestration. Combining decades of enterprise 
CRM governance with a proactive focus on operationalising AI-first workflows and leveraging LLM-
native tools to accelerate systems development. Skilled at prioritising strategic technical architecture 
and system automation over tactical content execution to drive measurable revenue growth. 
Key Skills 
AI-Powered GTM Automation & Data Hygiene | Global Marketing Performance Reporting | Strategic CRM 
Architecture & Workflows (SFDC, LeanData) | Lead Lifecycle, Scoring & Prioritisation Optimisation | Lead 
Management & Assignment | Advanced Analytics (PowerBI, Tableau) | Marketing Automation Stack 
(Marketo, Eloqua, Pardot) | Process (SOP) Optimisation & Improvement | Process Workflows & Decision 
Nodes | Persona Mapping & Normalisation | Budget Management | Form and Workflow Maintenance (Jira) 
| Complex Data Comparisons (AI, Formulas and Tools) | Regulatory Compliance | Stakeholder Enablement 
& Training | Campaign Audits 
Career Experience 
Global Senior Marketing Operations Manager l Proofpoint, Inc 
May 2019 - May 2026 
Multi-billion dollar cybersecurity leader 
▪ 
Global Performance Reporting: Owned global marketing performance reporting, providing executive 
leadership with real-time visibility into pipeline targets and marketing’s contribution to revenue. 
▪ 
AI-Driven Hygiene: Sustained 80%+ data accuracy across global SFDC through proactive AI-driven 
hygiene programmes, drastically reducing routing errors and reporting lag. 
▪ 
Automated Lead Routing: Took charge of the global lead assignment engine via LeanData, achieving 
95% manual-free routing and ensuring leads reached the right rep with the right context. 
▪ 
Funnel Optimisation: Analysed end-to-end conversion inefficiencies to drive a 50% improvement in 
MQL-to-opportunity conversion through strategic stakeholder collaboration. 
▪ 
Lead Scoring & Prioritisation: Designed and maintained the programmes, directly improving BDR 
efficiency and increasing the proportion of quality sales-ready leads passed to the business, enabling 
faster pipeline progression. 
▪ 
Regulatory Compliance: Appointed as Global Lead for data privacy requests, actioning within 24 hours. 
▪ 
Enablement & Knowledge Management: Built and maintained a centralised marketing knowledge & 
request base - GTM playbooks, tool documentation, onboarding guides and request portal. 
▪ 
Projects 
o 
Strategic CRM Architecture: Enhanced marketer experience to ensure accurate and applicable 
data capture for reporting and planning through intake forms and auditing processes. 
o 
Data Normalisation/ICP: Improved targeting segmentation quality to 90% utilising AI tools. 
o 
Attribution Modelling partnered with the analytics team to set the parameters for attribution 
(multiple models), ensuring marketing obtained credit where due against targets. 
o 
Partner/MSP GTM Architecture: Designed and managed the global partner lead management 
process, ensuring seamless data capture and attribution for multi-channel GTM motions. 
Emma Palmer | Senior Marketing Operations Manager 
2 
Global Senior Marketing Performance Manager l Criteo SA 
Jun 2017 - May 2019 
▪ 
Drove ROI on marketing investments across global marketing programmes based on key KPIs. 
▪ 
Managed marketing performance and tracking. 
▪ 
Created and managed tools and dashboards to create insight for continuous monitoring and 
improvement. 
▪ 
Collaborated on analysing and interpreting data with marketing, sales and sales operations.

Trained and guided regional teams on reporting, dashboards and best practice, resulting in 90% 
accuracy pre audit. 
▪ 
Developed and documented clear processes (SOPs) and a framework to drive efficiency and best 
practice. 
▪ 
Led ad-hoc marketing operations projects, tools, and data management - hygiene, privacy, 
segmentation, enrichment. 
 
Global Marketing Operations Director l S&P Global 
Oct 2016 - Jun 2017 
Created Marketing Operations function globally and ensured readiness of the marketing function: 
▪ 
Infrastructure Systems and Tools. 
▪ 
Data Management & Data Privacy. 
▪ 
Marketing Processes & Enablement. 
▪ 
Measurement using Reporting, Dashboards & Analytics. 
▪ 
Budget Management. 
 
Senior Marketing Operations Manager (EMEA) l Veritas/Cohesity  
Aug 2015 - Aug 2016 
▪ 
Managed rules and processes for progression of MQLs to sales. 
▪ 
Owned lead conversion process in sales and marketing funnel. 
▪ 
Drove consistency and cross-geo alignment of definitions and KPIs. 
▪ 
Produced reports visualising marketing impact on sales pipeline. 
▪ 
Collaborated with sales to facilitate outbound (TM) call activity. 
▪ 
Contributed to development of demand gen campaigns. 
▪ 
Managed vendor relationships to support syndicated lead generation programs. 
▪ 
Optimised marketing tool utilisation through the application of established company frameworks. 
 
Additional tenure at FireEye, NTT Security, Symantec, McAfee, and Oracle. Full history available on LinkedIn. 
Projects & Achievements 
▪ 
Implemented and audited global campaign nomenclature, including alignment to hierarchical 
campaigns at multiple companies. 
▪ 
Streamlined SFDC Campaign layout to improve data capture flow and cross-functional reporting. 
▪ 
Data Normalisation for segmentation into role, function, level and persona (ICP). 
▪ 
Lean Data optimised global lead assignment. 
▪ 
Lead scoring and prioritisation to enable BDR success. 
▪ 
Standardised and consolidated campaign types. 
▪ 
Partner Lead Management process with multiple partners across EMEA. 
▪ 
Researched and deployed Uptempo/Allocadia and integrated with SFDC to establish plan to spend 
lifecycle..
